en: How do you go to the block-house?
I drive to the block-house.
How does he go to the hospital?
He walks to the hospital.
How do you go to Penghu?
I go to Penghu by plane.
How do you go to Penghu?
I go to Penghu by boat.
How do you go home?
I go home by MRT.
How does Abus go to school?

ab: Tun daza Abus sun laihlaihsapuz munhan kaku.
en: Abus goes to school by train.
How does Talum go to church?
Talum goes to church by bicycle.

ab: Tun daza as cie’iun munhan kaku?
en: Do you go to school by MRT?

ab: Nii, tun daza ak vasu munhan kaku.
en: No, I go to school by bus.
Do you go to school by bicycle?

ab: Uu, tun tauntaun aak munhaan kaku.
en: Yes, I go to school by bicycle.
Do you go to Kaohsiung by High Speed Rail?
Yes, I go to Kaohsiung by High Speed Rail.

ab: Tun daza naupa as laihlaih sapuz i hikuki munhan taitu?
ch: A:你去台東搭火車還是搭飛機?
en: Are you going to Taitung by train or by plane?

ab: Tun daza ak hikuki, tun daza hikuki mastan haiiai i laihlaih sapuz.
ch: B:我搭飛機，搭飛機比搭火車快。
en: I will take the plane because it is faster than the train.

ab: Munhan kiukai a tun daza naupa as vasu a anak naupa untin?
ch: A:你去教會搭公車還是開車?
en: Are you going to drive to the church or take the bus?

ab: Anak ak untin munhan kiukai. Anak untin a mastan tun daza vasu masihal.
ch: B:我開車去教會，開車比搭公車方便。
en: I will drive to the church because it is more convenient than the bus.

ab: Mishuan su lumaq kamadaing tu babalivan?
en: Is the market close to your house?

ab: Daqvisan nan. Tun utuvai ak munhan kamadaing tu babalivan.
ch: B:不近，我都騎摩托車去超市。
en: No, it is not, so I always ride the motorcycle to the market.
Is the post office close to the school?
Yes, it is within walking distance.
Is the restaurant close to the station?

ab: Minahan papaluan tananak hima pungkan na maqtu taudadip.
ch: B:出車站再走五分鐘就到了。
en: It only takes five minutes after you walk out of the station.
